title: options.codex
description: Per-session knobs for the Codex (`codex mcp-server`) backend. Each field is forwarded as an argument on the `codex` (new session) or `codex-reply` (continue) MCP tool call (see spec §5.4.2 and §6.2). Unset fields fall back to Codex defaults from ~/.codex/config.toml.

cwd.description: Working directory for the Codex session. Resolved against the daemon's cwd if relative.

base-instructions.description: Replaces Codex's default base instructions for this session.

developer-instructions.description: Injected as a developer-role message at session start.

compact-prompt.description: Prompt used when compacting the conversation.

config.description: Free-form object deep-merged over ~/.codex/config.toml. Forwarded to `codex mcp-server` as `-c key=value` arguments.

include_raw_events.description: Translation-layer flag. When true, every agent.* frame for this session carries the original `msg` from the underlying notifications/codex/event under `raw`. Default false.

user_echo.description: Translation-layer flag. When true, the daemon emits agent.user_echo for item_completed{UserMessage} events. Off by default; matches the claude backend's default so both backends are symmetric out-of-the-box. Tool-result events flow regardless.
